data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Breakdown Reveals A Deeper Market Dynamic
data.description:
A new snapshot of public Bitcoin treasury data highlights how mining companies now hold a meaningful, but still secondary, share of corporate Bitcoin reserves. The chart shows that mining firms collectively hold around 127,000 BTC, representing 12% of total publicly disclosed Bitcoin treasury holdings.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-treasury-breakdown-reveals-a-deeper-market-dynamic/

data.title: Can Dogecoin Really Fall To $0.05 In 2026? This Analyst Thinks So
data.description:
Dogecoin traders have heard the “five-cent” call before. It’s the kind of number that sounds like bait until price action starts behaving like it might actually get there. On Friday, DOGE was changing hands around $0. 140, up slightly on the day, while bitcoin hovered near $92,300
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/can-dogecoin-really-fall-to-0-05-in-2026/

data.title: Polychain Capital Receives Significant PENDLE Transfers
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that Polychain Capital received three substantial PENDLE transfers between 02:11 and 02:13. The total amount transferred was 3,851,753.92 PENDLE, originating from different anonymous addresses.

At 02:11, 1,098,619.92 PENDLE were transferred from an anonymous address starting with 0x6478 to Polychain Capital. At 02:12, another transfer of 1,324,828 PENDLE occurred from an address beginning with 0x21fB. Finally, at 02:13, 1,428,305 PENDLE were sent from an address starting with 0x981D to Polychain Capital.

data.title: More than 100 mining farms busted in one Russian region
data.description:
Dozens of crypto farms have stopped mining this year as a result of an ongoing crackdown on illegal coin minting operations across Russia’s southwest. The tally from the fight to put an end to the phenomenon comes months after the crypto-related activity was totally banned in this part of the enormous country. Dagestan takes the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/more-than-100-mining-farms-busted-in-one-russian-region/

data.title: The 3-day wait to settle your stock trades is about to die, thanks to a new SEC approval you missed
data.description:
The Depository Trust Company, the U. S. financial market infrastructure provider that clears and settles securities trades, said the SEC has given it informal approval to move ahead with a tokenization service for some assets it already holds in custody, without facing enforcement action
source: https://cryptoslate.com/the-3-day-wait-to-settle-your-stock-trades-is-about-to-die-thanks-to-a-new-sec-approval-you-missed/

data.title: Ripple receives conditional approval from the USOCC to charter a national trust bank
data.description:
Ripple just took a direct step into federal banking oversight after the US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency confirmed that the company received conditional approval to form Ripple National Trust Bank, a national trust bank that will sit under federal supervision. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse posted on X that “HUGE news! @Ripple just […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-conditional-approval-from-the-usocc/

data.title: Oracle stock slips some more after OpenAI data center delays into 2028
data.description:
Oracle took another hit after word spread that several data centers tied to its massive OpenAI contract will now finish in 2028, not 2027. Reportedly, the change came from labor shortages and limits on key materials, and investors reacted fast. The stock dropped as much as 6. 5%, then traded down 5. 3% at $188. 26 on Friday. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracle-openai-data-center-delays-into-2028/

data.title: Analysts boost Alphabet stock price target to $350 thanks to Gemini
data.description:

John kept his buy rating on the Google parent and said the stronger call comes after the stock already climbed 65% this year. He wrote […]
